languages.text: "И тем самым потеряют бдительность? Это не выход, Лорд-капитан. Я поговорю с Иокастой, уверена, мы что-нибудь придумаем. Например, совместные караулы или усиление карательных операций бойцами 32-го".
"And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."
languages.original_text: "И тем самым потеряют бдительность? Это не выход, Лорд-капитан. Я поговорю с Иокастой, уверена, мы что-нибудь придумаем. Например, совместные караулы или усиление карательных операций бойцами 32-го".

traits.locale_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."
"And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."
"This is what Colonel Batoshski always feared. But he thought we would all be put to the wall or thrown in jail immediately. So he wasn't entirely correct."
"And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."
"And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

languages.text: 「これはバトシスキー大佐がいつも恐れていたことだ。でも、彼は私たち全員がすぐに壁に立てられたり、投獄されたりすると考えていた。だから、彼は完全に正しいとは言えない」
languages.original_text: "This is what Colonel Batoshski always feared. But he thought we would all be put to the wall or thrown in jail immediately. So he wasn't entirely correct."

languages.text: "Yani gardlarını mı düşürsünler? Çözüm bu olamaz Lord Kaptan. Jocasta ile konuşacağım. Eminim bir çözüm buluruz. Belki ortak devriyeler atarız ya da cezalandırma operasyonlarını desteklemek için 32. Alay'ı kullanırız."
languages.original_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

traits.locale_text: "Yani gardlarını mı düşürsünler? Çözüm bu olamaz Lord Kaptan. Jocasta ile konuşacağım. Eminim bir çözüm buluruz. Belki ortak devriyeler atarız ya da cezalandırma operasyonlarını desteklemek için 32. Alay'ı kullanırız."

languages.text: “然后他们就会放下戒备？这可不是办法，舰长大人。我会去和约卡斯塔谈谈，肯定能找到解决办法。或许搞个联合巡逻，或者让第32团去支援惩戒行动。”
languages.original_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

traits.locale_text: “然后他们就会放下戒备？这可不是办法，舰长大人。我会去和约卡斯塔谈谈，肯定能找到解决办法。或许搞个联合巡逻，或者让第32团去支援惩戒行动。”

languages.text: "Und unachtsam werden? Das ist keine Lösung, Lord Captain. Ich werde mit Jocasta reden. Ich bin sicher, wir finden eine Lösung. Vielleicht gemeinsame Patrouillen oder das 32. hilft bei Strafaktionen."
languages.original_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

traits.locale_text: "Und unachtsam werden? Das ist keine Lösung, Lord Captain. Ich werde mit Jocasta reden. Ich bin sicher, wir finden eine Lösung. Vielleicht gemeinsame Patrouillen oder das 32. hilft bei Strafaktionen."

languages.text: « Ils ne baisseront pas leur garde. Ce n'est pas une bonne idée, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je parlerai à Jocasta. Nous trouverons sans doute une solution. Nous pourrions effectuer des patrouilles conjointes, ou employer le 32e régiment pour mener des opérations punitives. »
languages.original_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

traits.locale_text: « Ils ne baisseront pas leur garde. Ce n'est pas une bonne idée, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je parlerai à Jocasta. Nous trouverons sans doute une solution. Nous pourrions effectuer des patrouilles conjointes, ou employer le 32e régiment pour mener des opérations punitives. »

languages.text: «¿Y bajar la guardia? Esa no es la respuesta, Lord Capitán. Hablaré con Jocasta. Estoy segura de que podemos dar con una solución. Quizá patrullas conjuntas o usar al 32.º para reforzar las operaciones de castigo».
languages.original_text: "And let their guard down? That's not the answer, Lord Captain. I'll talk to Jocasta. I'm sure we'll find a solution. Maybe joint patrols, or using the 32nd to bolster punitive operations."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y bajar la guardia? Esa no es la respuesta, Lord Capitán. Hablaré con Jocasta. Estoy segura de que podemos dar con una solución. Quizá patrullas conjuntas o usar al 32.º para reforzar las operaciones de castigo».
